headline: Cash flow is key to determine AI winners, says Summit Global's David Harden
summary: David Harden, Summit Global Investments CEO, joins 'The Exchange' to discuss the upcoming AI winners, what to make of the AI trade and much more.

headline: Ramp elevates CTO to co-CEO
summary: “If you know us, this won’t feel like a change,” wrote Eric Glyman of fellow co-founder Karim Atiyeh’s move to the top of the fintech.

raw.headline: Ramp elevates CTO to co-CEO
raw.summary: “If you know us, this won’t feel like a change,” wrote Eric Glyman of fellow co-founder Karim Atiyeh’s move to the top of the fintech.
